title: Restore archive index consistency and paragraph formatting

sources.reason: Repository rules for Work Item evidence, generated status, and append-only archive records.
Archive discovery index missing the entries corresponding to already archived Work Items 37–39.
Authoritative page containing the English sentence that needs paragraph separation.
Prior correction Contract that explicitly requires preserving the generated archive index update.

problemStatement: The prior correction removed archive index entries 37–39 to satisfy ownership checks, creating a contradiction between the archived evidence and the discovery index. The philosophy page also needs one remaining English sentence separated into its own paragraph.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Archive index entries 37, 38, and 39 match the immutable archived Contract/Summary records.
evidence: Index entry hashes compared with archived Contract/Summary files

scenarioCoverage.scenario: The English sentence following the Japanese Convergence paragraph is rendered as a separate paragraph.
Prior archived Work Item Contract/Summary files remain unchanged.
evidence: Git comparison against prior correction commit

riskAssessment.reason: Documentation and generated-index consistency correction; immutable archive evidence is out of scope.

executionDecision.reason: The index contradiction, language-formatting correction, immutable archive boundary, and verification evidence are explicit.

preReviewWarnings: Review index entry hashes and paragraph boundaries; confirm no archived evidence files were edited.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Archive index entries 37, 38, and 39 are restored with paths, sequences, and hashes matching the immutable archived records.
The English sentence beginning 'We choose the direction' is a separate Markdown paragraph after the Japanese translation.
No file under .ai/work-items/archive/2026/** is modified, and no runtime, schema, release workflow, or test file changes.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: The prior ownership workaround deleted generated archive index entries 37–39, so the discovery index no longer reflects the authoritative archived Contract/Summary records. The remaining document formatting issue is independent but belongs to the same acceptance correction.
constraints: Restore index metadata without changing any archived Contract or Summary file.
Keep Japanese body prose coherent and place English source sentences in standalone paragraphs.
Do not modify runtime, schema, release workflow, tests, or compatibility entry points.
intent.rationale: The archive index is discovery metadata, while archived Contract/Summary files remain authoritative. Restoring matching entries removes the contradiction without rewriting history.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
